data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of having an alternative link if the primary link fails. However, the evidence provided does not include any information or checks regarding the existence of an alternative link, which is a critical part of the requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an alternative link, but there is no evidence confirming its implementation or availability, indicating a gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an alternative link if the primary link fails.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
